message:
test(watchdog): add 17 warning-driven MuxWatchdog tests (ft-1360.1)

Add focused unit tests for shard health warning integration into
MuxWatchdog status evaluation. Tests cover warning_status_from_line
keyword mapping for all degraded/critical/hung keywords,
warning_status_from_lines severity folding, and check() integration
with mock watchdog warnings including blank-line filtering, max-severity
escalation, and report reflection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
